---
name: Artifact proposal
about: Propose a new or changed prompt-native artifact
title: "[artifact] "
labels: ["needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What is wrong, missing, or unclear?

## Desired outcome

What should be true after this is solved?

## Artifact class

- [ ] charter
- [ ] contract
- [ ] operational
- [ ] evidence
- [ ] governance

## Proposed change class

- [ ] C0 editorial
- [ ] C1 local behavior
- [ ] C2 shared contract or policy
- [ ] C3 constitutional

## Affected artifacts

List the files, directories, or artifact families likely to change.

## Evidence or examples

Include examples, transcripts, benchmarks, or references that explain the need.

## Risks if unchanged

What failure mode persists if this is not addressed?
